items.name_en: 5NR461, New Mini Lucky Bag, made of imported vintage soft sheepskin, vintage distressed hardware, full of premium feel. The design is unique, with smooth lines. Whether as a small handbag or a practical crossbody, it showcases Miu's unique charm. Wear it to easily become a fashion focus. Whether for daily street wear or important occasions, it will make you stand out.
